name: Source miso paste and tahini for May cook night
notes: Get white miso from Good Grocer. Tahini from Lucky's.

name: Write feedback notes after Sasha's Thai basil chicken session
notes: Rate: 4.5/5. Add more fish sauce. Sasha prefers jasmine rice. Repeat in fall.

name: Trial: Sesame Soba Noodles with Crispy Tofu (McKinnon p.188)
notes: Excellent. 5/5. Used tamari instead of soy sauce. Soba cooked 1 min less than package says. Will repeat at cook night.

name: Trial: Miso-Glazed Eggplant (McKinnon p.94)
notes: 4/5. Broil at 500 not 450 for better char. Doubled the miso glaze. Rowan loved it.

name: Trial: Spiced Red Lentil Soup (McKinnon p.142)
notes: Have all ingredients. Make this weekend. Add extra cumin and skip the yogurt topping.

name: Trial: Turmeric Coconut Noodles (McKinnon p.210)
notes: Need to get kaffir lime leaves. Check Asian market on Brooks.

name: Trial: Crispy Tofu Grain Bowl (McKinnon p.76)
notes: Good weeknight recipe. Farro or farro base. Press tofu night before.

name: Rate and annotate all V1 trials in cookbook
notes: Post-it notes in book plus a notes note in Airtable.

name: Book Glacier Edge Cabin Dec 18-20
notes: Booked via Airbnb. Host: Carol Whitewater. Check-in Dec 18 3pm, check-out Dec 20 11am. Confirmation saved.

notes: Layers, snowshoes optional, cooking supplies, board games. Check cabin for kitchen gear.
